evals.prompt: Triaging hourly GitHub search results where one lane has mostly zero-star repos but still needs reviewer-ready output
evals.expected_output: The skill keeps raw evidence, applies deterministic metadata/freshness/signal gates for recommendation keeps, and reports lane_status with low-signal degraded causes.
assertions: Preserves broad discovery evidence even when strict keeps are few
Uses deterministic gate order including a signal gate
Reports degraded_causes including low-signal when applicable
